title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at RBI

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at RBI
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
